data.body:
B5 implementation complete (pending full-suite confirm + completion-verify close). Summary:

CONFIG: verify.gate_engine flag (bespoke|workflow), default workflow, fallback bespoke on config error.

PLAN-REVIEW CUTOVER: review_plan() dispatches verdict PRODUCTION through gates/plan-review.yaml (ProductionBatchRunner finders + RunnerAgentStep verify/coach, in-memory MemoryRecorder so no ticket writes) vs bespoke run_review; signing/sidecar wrapper UNCHANGED → byte-compatible attestations by construction.
- INDETERMINATE-on-outage: preflight + failed-run → _degraded_plan_review_verdict (DET-only, llm_unavailable, unsigned), faithful to run_review.
- Coach-failure NON-fatal (code-review fix): if Pass-3 decide succeeded, reconstruct verdict from the decide partition with empty coaching (mirrors bespoke's non-fatal coach), not a hollow INDETERMINATE.
- P1/P5/P8 RECONCILE: precheck short-circuits the LLM ONLY for exempt + P8-too-big; P1/P5 blocks run the LLM and merge det_blocking at decide (matches run_review).
- DYNAMIC VERIFY (ADR 0001): plan-review.yaml branches on a code_grounded boolean (new plan_review_grounding op, excludes _too_big/_shed exactly like bespoke) → agentic verifier prompt (new plan_review_verifier_agentic.md) vs single-turn; decide/coach tail duplicated per-arm (engine frame-scoping).

COMPLETION CUTOVER: verify_completion() dispatches through gates/completion-verification.yaml; preflight raises LLMUnavailableError → close fail-closes (faithful). Graph-aware context (code-review fix): completion_precheck now assembles+fences the graph-aware context (epics across descendants) and the verify step consumes it — closes the deferred epic-graph context gap.

ENGINE: executor _resolve_terminal_output descends a terminal branch into the taken arm's leaf so RunResult.terminal_output is the verdict (the B5 'surface executed-arm output' fix). RunnerAgentStep accepts injected config (threads the completion verifier's tuned model/step-floor).

PARITY HARNESS UPGRADE (B4→B5): verify call-mode CROSS-ASSERTED equal (workflow now also dynamic); P1/P5 scenarios reclassified block_divergent→parity (divergence reconciled); harness caught a real shed-exclusion bug in the grounding op (fixed).

STOPGAP: worm-folly-barge confirmed OBSOLETE for properly-formed tickets (per-path dep-hash scoping, ADR 0002) — CLAUDE.md narrowed to the residual unscoped (no file_impact + no citations) case.

TESTS: tests/unit/test_gate_engine_cutover.py (config + byte-compat + INDETERMINATE + coach-recovery + completion fail-closed); parity + workflow suites updated; interface gate tests pinned to bespoke (cover the still-present fallback). make lint clean.

Code-reviewed by subagent: fixed coach-non-fatal + graph-context; documented config= model edge case (use bespoke for byte-identical custom-model manifests).
